  mkRelevantFinalObjects = exportedFinalObjects: allDependencies:
        exportedFinalObjects;
      exportedPackages,
          exportedPackages
      exportedFinalObjects =
        mkExportedFinalObjects finalObjects exportedPackages;
        mkRelevantFinalObjects exportedFinalObjects allDependencies;
                exportedPackages;
            packages = exportedPackages;
